prompt: Create a cinematic close-up anime illustration of a shy schoolgirl leaning very close toward the viewer as if peering over the edge of a bed, shot with an extreme wide-angle perspective and shallow depth of field. She has long straight black hair with messy bangs falling across her face, very large glossy golden brown eyes, a small surprised open mouth, soft blush, and a curious innocent expression. Her outfit is a Japanese school uniform: white short-sleeve blouse, pale yellow sweater vest with thin red trim, green pleated skirt partly visible, and one large teal bow at the collar. The camera is low and intimate, with her face dominating the right half of the frame, hair strands crossing the lens, and her shoulders and torso foreshortened. Background: a cozy teenage bedroom at dusk, warm dim interior light, dark wooden ceiling and walls, one window on the left with purple curtains and a twilight sky outside, one bed in the foreground with blurred bedding, one cat-shaped plush pillow on the bed at left, one desk area on the right with books, one pink desk chair, and one small wall poster. Use polished modern anime film rendering, detailed eyes with bright white highlights, clean line art, soft painterly shading, warm shadows, slight vignette, cinematic 16:9 composition, high detail, no text, no watermark.
